creator: lme@FreeBSD.org
text:
In tzsetup when you select "Germany" as timezone another window pops-up asking if you live "Busingen" or "most locations".

Büsingen is a tiny German exclave in Switzerland with 1,300 citizens. The probability that this small village will ever be in a different timezone than the rest of Germany is nearly zero.

Please remove the pop-up window and do no longer confuse German users.
